# Mod Submission

## Mod info

- **Name:** 
- **id:** 
- **Repo:** https://github.com/
- **Latest release tag:** v

## Checklist

- [ ] I own the mod repo (or have permission to submit on the author's behalf).
- [ ] `manifest.json#version` matches the GitHub Release tag (without the `v`).
- [ ] Zip asset is named `<modId>-<version>.zip` with `manifest.json` at the root.
- [ ] Tested on the latest published Maker Studio version.
- [ ] No obfuscated, minified, or packed JS — source is readable.
- [ ] All declared `permissions` are actually used by the code.
- [ ] No hidden network calls to unknown hosts.
- [ ] Mod loads without errors in the Mod Manager log.
- [ ] (Optional) Release is signed — `<modId>-<version>.zip.minisig` attached, pubkey included in this PR.

## Description

What does this mod do?

## Permissions justification

If your manifest declares any `permissions`, explain why each one is needed.

## Notes for the maintainer

(Anything unusual, breaking changes, dependencies on other mods, etc.)
